# Multi cidr list match (cidr list matching)

**Dataset**: `gx_10_conn` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IP / CIDR matching with incidr and the is_* address helpers. Multi cidr list match. `incidr()` tests an IP against a CIDR (literal multi-CIDR string only — not a column); the `is_*` address helpers return a boolean (false, not null, on non-match).

```sql
dataset = gx_10_conn | alter in_corp = incidr(dst_ip, "10.0.0.0/8, 192.168.0.0/16, 172.16.0.0/12") | filter is_ipv4(dst_ip) = true | fields dst_ip, in_corp | sort asc dst_ip
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 15). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
